ground_truth.title: Graphic Design Certification Course Online with Software & Exam
ground_truth.main_content:
Graphic Design Certification Course Online - 100% online with software, live support, and industry-recognized certificate. This graphic design course is designed to equip you with the skills and knowledge needed to thrive in the design industry. With a project-based curriculum, you'll gain hands-on experience using the latest Adobe software while working on real-world projects. Price: $1,999 for 180 clock hours of training.

This course provides you with the skills and knowledge needed to excel in the world of digital and print graphic design. By focusing on popular software tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign, these courses are tailored to beginners and professionals alike, helping you create compelling visual content. This is perfect for marketing and design professionals looking to advance their careers, specifically with AEC industry marketing & design projects.

Key Graphic Design Skills You'll Gain:
- Photoshop: Master photo editing, retouching, and creating visually stunning digital artwork. Learn how to enhance images and develop professional layouts for web and print design.
- Illustrator: Gain skills in creating beautiful vector graphics for logos, illustrations, and marketing materials. Explore tools to create precision designs with scalable flexibility.
- InDesign: Learn to design professional-level layouts for books, magazines, and marketing brochures. Efficiently combine text and imagery to produce polished and impactful designs.

This course includes: 180 hours of project-based training from experts, 308 training videos, Access to Photoshop, Illustrator & InDesign software (8 months), Adobe Certified Professional exam in Photoshop, Illustrator & InDesign, Learn from an Adobe Certified Professional, 1-on-1 bonus training, Verified digital certificate of completion, Learn at an accredited institution, Credits: 18 CEUs, Quizzes to reinforce learning.

The curriculum consists of four units: Unit 1 - Intro to Photoshop Course Online (30 Hours), Unit 2 - Intermediate Photoshop Course Online (30 Hours), Unit 3 - Illustrator Course Online, Unit 4 - InDesign Course Online.
